---
navbar: false
grid:
  sidebar-width: 0px
  body-width: 1200px
  margin-width: 0px
---

::: {.temp-page}

![](/_img/logo-homepage.png){style='max-width:100%;'}

# PAGE NOT FOUND

:::

```{=html}
<style>
html {
  zoom: 60%
}
.temp-page {
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 3rem;
  h1 {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    border: 0;
  }
  p {
    font-size: 1.7rem;
  }
}
.nav-footer {
  display: none
}
</style>
```
